lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੈ ਬਾਚੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਚੁ ਸਮਝੁ ਮਨ ਬਉਰਾ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: bikhai baach har raach samajh man bauraa re |
lines.english: So escape from corruption and immerse yourself in the Lord; take this advice, O crazy mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਭੈ ਹੋਇ ਨ ਹਰਿ ਭਜੇ ਮਨ ਬਉਰਾ ਰੇ ਗਹਿਓ ਨ ਰਾਮ ਜਹਾਜੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: nirabhai hoe na har bhaje man bauraa re gahio na raam jahaaj |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You have not meditated fearlessly on the Lord, O crazy mind; you have not embarked upon the Lord's Boat. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਕਟ ਮੁਸਟੀ ਅਨਾਜ ਕੀ ਮਨ ਬਉਰਾ ਰੇ ਲੀਨੀ ਹਾਥੁ ਪਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: marakatt musattee anaaj kee man bauraa re leenee haath pasaar |
lines.english: The monkey stretches out its hand, O crazy mind, and takes a handful of corn;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਨਲਨੀ ਸੂਅਟਾ ਗਹਿਓ ਮਨ ਬਉਰਾ ਰੇ ਮਾਯਾ ਇਹੁ ਬਿਉਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jiau nalanee sooattaa gahio man bauraa re maayaa ihu biauhaar |
lines.english: Like the parrot caught in the trap, O crazy mind, you trapped by the affairs of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੂਟਨ ਕੋ ਸਹਸਾ ਪਰਿਆ ਮਨ ਬਉਰਾ ਰੇ ਨਾਚਿਓ ਘਰ ਘਰ ਬਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: chhoottan ko sahasaa pariaa man bauraa re naachio ghar ghar baar |2|
lines.english: now unable to escape, O crazy mind, it is made to dance door to door. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਕਸੁੰਭ ਕਾ ਮਨ ਬਉਰਾ ਰੇ ਤਿਉ ਪਸਰਿਓ ਪਾਸਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jaisaa rang kasunbh kaa man bauraa re tiau pasario paasaar |3|
lines.english: Like the weak dye of the safflower, O crazy mind, so is the expanse of this world of form and substance. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਵਨ ਕਉ ਤੀਰਥ ਘਨੇ ਮਨ ਬਉਰਾ ਰੇ ਪੂਜਨ ਕਉ ਬਹੁ ਦੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: naavan kau teerath ghane man bauraa re poojan kau bahu dev |
lines.english: There are so many holy shrines in which to bathe, O crazy mind, and so many gods to worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਕਬੀਰ ਛੂਟਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਮਨ ਬਉਰਾ ਰੇ ਛੂਟਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਸੇਵ ॥੪॥੧॥੬॥੫੭॥
lines.translit: kahu kabeer chhoottan nahee man bauraa re chhoottan har kee sev |4|1|6|57|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, you shall not be saved like this, O crazy mind; only by serving the Lord will you find release. ||4||1||6||57||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਨਿ ਨ ਦਹੈ ਪਵਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਮਗਨੈ ਤਸਕਰੁ ਨੇਰਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: agan na dahai pavan nahee maganai tasakar ner na aavai |
lines.english: Fire does not burn it, and the wind does not blow it away; thieves cannot get near it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree |
lines.english: Gauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਧਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਸੰਚਉਨੀ ਸੋ ਧਨੁ ਕਤ ਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raam naam dhan kar sanchaunee so dhan kat hee na jaavai |1|
lines.english: Accumulate the wealth of the Lord's Name; that wealth does not go anywhere. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮਰਾ ਧਨੁ ਮਾਧਉ ਗੋਬਿੰਦੁ ਧਰਣੀਧਰੁ ਇਹੈ ਸਾਰ ਧਨੁ ਕਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: hamaraa dhan maadhau gobind dharaneedhar ihai saar dhan kaheeai |
lines.english: My wealth is God, the Lord of Wealth, the Lord of the Universe, the Support of the earth: this is called the most excellent wealth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਧਨ ਕਾਰਣਿ ਸਿਵ ਸਨਕਾਦਿਕ ਖੋਜਤ ਭਏ ਉਦਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: eis dhan kaaran siv sanakaadik khojat bhe udaasee |
lines.english: Shiva and Sanak, in their search for this wealth, became Udaasees, and renounced the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸੁਖੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਸੋ ਸੁਖੁ ਰਾਜਿ ਨ ਲਹੀਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo sukh prabh gobind kee sevaa so sukh raaj na laheeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The peace which is obtained by serving God, the Lord of the Universe - that peace cannot be found in kingdoms or power. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਮੁਕੰਦੁ ਜਿਹਬਾ ਨਾਰਾਇਨੁ ਪਰੈ ਨ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਫਾਸੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: man mukand jihabaa naaraaein parai na jam kee faasee |2|
lines.english: One whose mind is filled with the Lord of liberation, and whose tongue chants the Name of the Lord, shall not be caught by the noose of Death. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਤ ਅੰਭ ਥੰਭਿ ਮਨੁ ਧਾਵਤ ਭਰਮ ਬੰਧਨ ਭਉ ਭਾਗਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jalat anbh thanbh man dhaavat bharam bandhan bhau bhaagaa |3|
lines.english: It is like water for the burning soul, like an anchoring support for the wandering mind; the bondage of doubt and fear is dispelled. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਧਨੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਨੀ ਤਾਸੁ ਸੁਮਤਿ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: nij dhan giaan bhagat gur deenee taas sumat man laagaa |
lines.english: My own wealth is the spiritual wisdom and devotion given by the Guru; my mind is held steady in perfect neutral balance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮ ਘਰਿ ਲਾਖ ਕੋਟਿ ਅਸ੍ਵ ਹਸਤੀ ਹਮ ਘਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਮੁਰਾਰੀ ॥੪॥੧॥੭॥੫੮॥
lines.translit: tum ghar laakh kott asv hasatee ham ghar ek muraaree |4|1|7|58|
lines.english: Within your home there are hundreds of thousands, millions of horses and elephants; but within my home is the One Lord. ||4||1||7||58||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੈ ਕਬੀਰੁ ਮਦਨ ਕੇ ਮਾਤੇ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਦੇਖੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: kahai kabeer madan ke maate hiradai dekh beechaaree |
lines.english: Says Kabeer: O you who are intoxicated with sexual desire, reflect upon this in your heart, and see.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਕਪਿ ਕੇ ਕਰ ਮੁਸਟਿ ਚਨਨ ਕੀ ਲੁਬਧਿ ਨ ਤਿਆਗੁ ਦਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: jiau kap ke kar musatt chanan kee lubadh na tiaag deo |
lines.english: Like the monkey with a handful of grain, who will not let go because of greed

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree |
lines.english: Gauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਬਿਰਥੇ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat bin birathe janam geo |
lines.english: Without devotional worship, human life passes away in vain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਕਰਮ ਕੀਏ ਲਾਲਚ ਸਿਉ ਤੇ ਫਿਰਿ ਗਰਹਿ ਪਰਿਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jo jo karam kee laalach siau te fir gareh pario |1|
lines.english: - just so, all the deeds committed in greed ultimately become a noose around one's neck. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਭਗਵਾਨ ਭਜਨ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਸਚੁ ਰਹਿਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasangat bhagavaan bhajan bin kahee na sach rahio |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, without vibrating and meditating on the Lord God, one does not abide in Truth. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਉਦਿਆਨ ਕੁਸਮ ਪਰਫੁਲਿਤ ਕਿਨਹਿ ਨ ਘ੍ਰਾਉ ਲਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: jiau udiaan kusam parafulit kineh na ghraau leo |
lines.english: Like the flower which blossoms in the wilderness with no one to enjoy its fragrance,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੈਸੇ ਭ੍ਰਮਤ ਅਨੇਕ ਜੋਨਿ ਮਹਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਕਾਲ ਹਇਓ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: taise bhramat anek jon meh fir fir kaal heo |2|
lines.english: so do people wander in reincarnation; over and over again, they are destroyed by Death. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਆ ਧਨ ਜੋਬਨ ਅਰੁ ਸੁਤ ਦਾਰਾ ਪੇਖਨ ਕਉ ਜੁ ਦਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: eaa dhan joban ar sut daaraa pekhan kau ju deo |
lines.english: This wealth, youth, children and spouse which the Lord has given you - this is all just a passing show.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ਅਟਕਿ ਜੋ ਉਰਝੇ ਇੰਦ੍ਰੀ ਪ੍ਰੇਰਿ ਲਇਓ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tin hee maeh attak jo urajhe indree prer leo |3|
lines.english: Those who are caught and entangled in these are carried away by sensual desire. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਭੈ ਸਾਗਰ ਤਰਨ ਕਉ ਮੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਓਟ ਲਇਓ ॥੪॥੧॥੮॥੫੯॥
lines.translit: keh kabeer bhai saagar taran kau mai satigur ott leo |4|1|8|59|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, to cross over the terriffying world-ocean, I have taken to the Shelter of the True Guru. ||4||1||8||59||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਧ ਅਨਲ ਤਨੁ ਤਿਨ ਕੋ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਚਹੁ ਦਿਸ ਠਾਟੁ ਠਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: aaudh anal tan tin ko mandar chahu dis tthaatt ttheo |
lines.english: Age is the fire, and the body is the house of straw; on all four sides, this play is being played out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਨੀ ਮੈਲਾ ਮਾਟੀ ਗੋਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: paanee mailaa maattee goree |
lines.english: The water of the sperm is cloudy, and the egg of the ovary is crimson.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ₈ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree₈ |
lines.english: Gauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸ ਮਾਟੀ ਕੀ ਪੁਤਰੀ ਜੋਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eis maattee kee putaree joree |1|
lines.english: From this clay, the puppet is fashioned. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਸਭੁ ਰਸੁ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਤੋਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tan dhan sabh ras gobind toraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: This body, wealth, and all delicacies are Yours, O Lord of the Universe. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਛੁ ਆਹਿ ਨ ਮੋਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: mai naahee kachh aaeh na moraa |
lines.english: I am nothing, and nothing is mine.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸ ਮਾਟੀ ਮਹਿ ਪਵਨੁ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: eis maattee meh pavan samaaeaa |
lines.english: Into this clay, the breath is infused.
